name: Donkey Kong
description:
Donkey Kong is a vertical platform game where the player, controlling a character called Jumpman (later known as Mario), must rescue a damsel (Pauline) from the clutches of a giant ape named Donkey Kong. Donkey Kong is positioned at the top of the screen, throwing barrels and other obstacles down towards Jumpman. The game takes place across four distinct stages, each featuring unique structural layouts and challenges.

The first stage consists of a construction site with inclined platforms connected by ladders. Jumpman must ascend these platforms, avoiding barrels rolled down by Donkey Kong. 

The second stage is a cement factory, where Jumpman navigates conveyor belts and elevators while avoiding fireballs.

The third stage is a series of elevators and ladders where the objective is to get to the top where Donkey Kong is standing and remove supporting pins. 

The fourth and final stage has the player on a series of platforms with ladders, removing supporting pins to bring Donkey Kong crashing down, thus rescuing Pauline. Once this occurs, the game resets back to the first stage with increased difficulty. Jumpman can jump over obstacles and climb ladders. He can also collect power-ups (such as a hammer) that allow him to temporarily destroy barrels. The game ends when Jumpman loses all his lives by touching an enemy or falling too far.
